sandbox._comment_allowUnsandboxedCommands: Disables the escape hatch. If a command fails inside the sandbox, Claude Code might normally attempt to retry it. Setting this to false ensures that all commands must run sandboxed.

filesystem._comment_denyWrite: Explicitly blocks write access to sensitive configuration files to prevent persistence mechanisms.
filesystem._comment_denyRead: Blocks read access to sensitive directories like ~/.ssh to prevent credential exfiltration.

network._comment_allowedDomains: Creates an explicit allowlist for network access, severely limiting an attacker's ability to exfiltrate data.
